inputs.text: main thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai, sir dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause similar symptoms, but it usually presents with abdominal cramps and diarrhea

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid is less likely at this stage, but it cannot be ruled out without further investigation

inputs.text: meri bukhar roz badh rahi hai, pet dard bhi hai, kabz ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are characteristic symptoms of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain and constipation, but the fever pattern is different

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely now, as the symptoms have progressed

inputs.text: ab mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness is highly suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause similar symptoms, but the presence of petechiae rash spots and severe weakness points towards typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause high fever and weakness, but the other symptoms do not fit well with malaria

inputs.text: main thak gaya hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai, khada bhi nahi ho pa raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's condition has worsened, and the symptoms are consistent with typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as the symptoms have progressed beyond gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as the symptoms do not fit with malaria
